# K For Kreative

> K For Kreative is a premium creative marketing agency for small businesses and personal brands in India. We specialise in video editing, social media management, Meta ads, and conversion-focused website development.

## About

K For Kreative helps small businesses and personal brands look premium, stay consistent, and grow faster. We focus on four core service areas: short-form video editing (Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, podcasts), social media management (content creation and scheduling), Meta ads (Facebook and Instagram advertising), and website development (conversion-focused landing pages and brand sites).

Our clients include health and wellness brands, coaches, personal brands, e-commerce businesses, and service providers across India.

## Services

- **Video Editing**: Short-form video editing for Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and podcast clips. Includes hook optimisation, captions, pacing, and repeatable monthly output.
- **Social Media Management**: Monthly social media strategy, content creation, and account management for Instagram and LinkedIn.
- **Meta Ads**: Facebook and Instagram ad campaigns — strategy, creative, targeting, and performance reporting for small businesses.
- **Website Development**: Conversion-focused website design and development for personal brands and service businesses.
